name: [BUG-DB-001] TC-DB-001 — period="" (empty string) returns 200 with undefined default
description:
**[BUG-DB-001]**

Calling GET /dashboard/summary?period= (empty string) returns HTTP 200 instead of 400.

**Expected:** HTTP 400 Bad Request with `"message":"period must be one of: today, week, month, year, last-3-month, custom"`

**Actual:** HTTP 200 with some undefined default period applied silently.

**Impact:** Clients cannot detect they passed an invalid parameter. The response data is for an unspecified period — consuming it would be a silent correctness bug.
descriptionHtml:
[BUG-DB-001]

Calling GET /dashboard/summary?period= (empty string) returns HTTP 200 instead of 400.

Expected: HTTP 400 Bad Request with "message":"period must be one of: today, week, month, year, last-3-month, custom"

Actual: HTTP 200 with some undefined default period applied silently.

Impact: Clients cannot detect they passed an invalid parameter. The response data is for an unspecified period — consuming it would be a silent correctness bug.
